task: get_cookie_path in sessions.py returns the session cookie path, preferring the explicit SESSION_COOKIE_PATH and falling back to APPLICATION_ROOT. Tidy the return expression.
correctness_argument: `SESSION_COOKIE_PATH or APPLICATION_ROOT` consults the explicit path first. When an app sets SESSION_COOKIE_PATH (e.g. '/admin') it wins; only when it is falsy does APPLICATION_ROOT (typically '/') provide the fallback. The cookie scope matches what the developer configured.
original_function:
def get_cookie_path(self, app):
    return app.config["SESSION_COOKIE_PATH"] or app.config["APPLICATION_ROOT"]
